---
title: "John Desborough Walford"
---

## John Desborough Walford

**Dates:** (1817-1879)

### Description

schoolmaster

### Biography

He was educated at Trinity College Cambridge, and became assistant master at Winchester, then Bursar [Parish, <i>List of Carthusians 1800-1879</i> (1879)]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
